faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in St. Albans?

faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps and yellow jackets, typically building large, enclosed paper nests in trees or under eaves. Yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities or wall voids and are more aggressive. Wasps build open-comb nests. All three require professional removal, but hornets are particularly defensive of their nests and their stings are more painful, making DIY removal dangerous.
